description: MOVE PIC 9V9 to PIC 9V99: decimal alignment pads trailing zero
notes: PIC 9V9 value 1.5 moved to PIC 9V99 = 1.50. Engine stores as Decimal, .value returns '1.50'. WS-DISPLAY is string — MOVE numeric to string uses to_display() which shows '1'. GAP: numeric→string display format may differ from IBM.
